title: AI resume screening
arguments: Recruitment platform uses machine learning to rank job candidates in the EU. Includes automated scoring and recommendations. --as-of 2026-02-15 --jurisdictions EU --industry hr-tech --include-emerging --strict-facts

title: Medical triage AI
arguments: Healthcare application in the EU uses AI to triage patient urgency and suggest care routing. --as-of 2026-02-15 --jurisdictions EU --industry healthcare-ai --include-emerging --strict-facts

title: Customer support chatbot
arguments: General customer support chatbot for an EU e-commerce site, no safety-critical decisions. --as-of 2026-02-15 --jurisdictions EU --industry ecommerce --include-emerging --strict-facts

title: EU AI loan underwriting model
arguments: EU lending platform uses AI to score loan applications and produce automated approval recommendations. --as-of 2026-02-15 --jurisdictions EU --industry fintech --include-emerging --strict-facts

title: EU marketing copy assistant
arguments: EU marketing SaaS uses a generative assistant to draft email copy and product descriptions with no automated eligibility or safety-critical decisions. --as-of 2026-02-15 --jurisdictions EU --industry martech --include-emerging --strict-facts
